film.title: Suhaag Raat
film.overview: A woman who gets widowed on her wedding night creates a scandal by becoming pregnant.

dialogues.dialogue: Beat him! Get out of here! You shameless woman! Whose sin are you carrying. Bear all sorrow like the earth 'Burn like the sun
All this for you. You ruined that house. Master dead. Mother in shame. And we are wondering. After hopeless I have to work here as school teacher. Yesterday I came here after transfer.
dialogues.cause_raw: causing harm and shame to family

dialogues.dialogue: I won't get into a widow's attire. Why? What are you so proud of? And if you are, bring back you husband. So that even, I can hug him & relieve the burden of sorrow on my heart.
